title: break up
lyrics: I hate how you all say goodbye, goodbye One tried goodbye, always, always, always goodbye I can see the clouds lifting away From the thoughts that darkness interrupts my day There's no way to have it all anyway I pray that these choices have salvation And I pray that you let just a little light stab your heart Let just a little light stab your heart I know it's cold outside But you gotta keep moving on You gotta move on from here Move right here You gotta move on from here Move right in time The thoughts come alive again in time I feel this was not my time Don't treat me like this distance But let go this instance Goodbye But don't treat me like I'm just a one take moment Years lost in cold moments Years gone and I don't know if I can Find that breath Feeling the love again It's moved on All the light passes down It's moved on I move on I move on So alone I move on So alone And sometimes you'll find a way And sometimes you'll find a way back to To the people you knew To the things that you loved So lost and far again Don't know where you'll find a way back to

lyricsSegments.text: I hate how you all say goodbye, goodbye
One tried goodbye, always, always, always goodbye
I can see the clouds lifting away
From the thoughts that darkness interrupts my day
There's no way to have it all anyway
I pray that these choices have salvation
And I pray that you let just a little light stab your heart
Let just a little light stab your heart
I know it's cold outside
But you gotta keep moving on
You gotta move on from here
Move right here
You gotta move on from here
Move right in time
The thoughts come alive again in time
I feel this was not my time
Don't treat me like this distance
But let go this instance
Goodbye
But don't treat me like I'm just a one take moment
Years lost in cold moments
Years gone and I don't know if I can
Find that breath
Feeling the love again
It's moved on
All the light passes down
It's moved on
I move on
I move on
So alone
I move on
So alone
And sometimes you'll find a way
And sometimes you'll find a way back to
To the people you knew
To the things that you loved
So lost and far again
Don't know where you'll find a way back to
